notableEvents.label: Braden Montgomery GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Braden Montgomery grounds into a double play, third baseman Amed Rosario to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Everson Pereira to 3rd. Edgar Quero out at 2nd. Braden Montgomery out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Braden Montgomery rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Braden Montgomery grounds into a double play, third baseman Amed Rosario to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Everson Pereira to 3rd. Edgar Quero out at 2nd. Braden Montgomery out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ali Sánchez reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Colson Montgomery.

notableEvents.label: Jacob Gonzalez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Gonzalez grounds out, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt.

notableEvents.label: Jacob Gonzalez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Gonzalez flies out to left fielder José Caballero.
